sizing_rule.note: Optimal f sizing: 1 unit per 4.347826087 units account equity (approximately 23% of equity per position). Apply to individual or simultaneous bets based on play dependency analysis. Formula: Position Size = Account Equity ÷ 4.347826087

source_rule_text: Apply optimal f to each bet individually or simultaneously by sizing position to 1 unit per 4.347826087 units of account equity, treating all plays as if they will be performed infinitely to maximize long-term growth.
